title: Decision Cadence Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger decision cadence foundations judgment so leadership / people work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Decision Cadence Foundations is a leverage point inside leadership / people. It supports the broader goal of hiring, delegation, culture, management, and communication.
coreConcepts: Decision Cadence Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good decision cadence foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Decision Cadence Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
